message:
fix: Code review cleanup and warning fixes

- auth.js: Remove redundant sessionStorage.removeItem after clearStoredSession()
- query.rs: Mark top_k_fused and QUICKSELECT_THRESHOLD as #[cfg(test)]
  since they're no longer used in production (replaced by full sort for
  content deduplication)
- query.rs: Remove unused mut on hydrate_semantic_hits result
- encryption.rs: Fix extra quote in encrypted-content div

All tests pass, no warnings.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
